name: Quick Sukiyaki
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups sliced fresh mushrooms, about 1/4 pound
1/2 cup green onions cut into 2-inch pieces
1/2 pound fresh spinach, torn into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Freeze meat for 1 hour to firm; slice into very thin strips.
2. In a skillet, brown mushrooms and cook carrots, celery, and onions in oil until just tender. Push ingredients to one side.
3. Add meat and cook until color changes.
4. Add gravy, spinach, and soy sauce. Heat, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in radishes.
6. Serve with rice. Makes about 6 cups, 6 servings.
